𝗡𝗘𝗢𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘 | To provide a feature-rich, visually enhanced graphical user interface for the Neovim text editor, offering a smoother and more modern user experience than traditional terminal interfaces.  🔥 Super Hot!

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a feature-rich, visually enhanced graphical user interface for the Neovim text editor, offering a smoother and more modern user experience than traditional terminal interfaces.
📅 Created: Dec 2019 • Updated: Apr 2026

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Rust-based Neovim GUI
✅ GPU acceleration via Skia
✅ Smooth scrolling and cursor animations
✅ Functional parity with terminal Neovim
✅ Pre-built releases for major OS


╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 14.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 613 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 247 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Neovide is a graphical user interface (GUI) for the Neovim text editor, built in Rust. It aims to provide a smooth and visually enhanced experience by leveraging GPU acceleration, while maintaining functional parity with Neovim's terminal UI. It offers features like smooth scrolling and cursor animations for a more modern feel.

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/neovide/neovide

𝗖𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗚𝗨𝗟𝗔 | Creating, burning, and verifying disk images from a user-friendly terminal interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating, burning, and verifying disk images from a user-friendly terminal interface.
📅 Created: Mar 2023 • Updated: Apr 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Disk imaging and burning
✅ TUI interface
✅ Disk listing with size and model info
✅ Compression support (gz, bz2, xz, lz4, zst)
✅ Hash validation (md5, sha1, sha256, etc.)
✅ Root privilege handling (sudo/doas/su)
✅ Confirmation dialogs
✅ Post-write disk verification
✅ Progress graphs


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Caligula is a lightweight, user-friendly TUI application for creating and verifying disk images. It offers features like disk listing, compression handling, hash validation, and post-write verification, all within a terminal interface.

📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Oh-my-claudecode is a TypeScript-based tool that orchestrates multiple AI agents for Claude Code, aiming to simplify complex coding tasks. It provides a zero-learning-curve experience for users, allowing them to leverage advanced AI capabilities for code generation and automation through intuitive commands and workflows.

📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✅ Interactive web interface
✅ Setup and cleanup scripts for scenarios
✅ Solution walkthroughs and flag discovery

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

EntraGoat is a deliberately vulnerable Microsoft Entra ID environment designed for security professionals to learn and practice identity security through hands-on attack simulations. It uses PowerShell and Microsoft Graph APIs to deploy intentional misconfigurations, offering multiple privilege escalation paths and black-box attack challenges.

𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗫𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗖𝗧 | Extracting structured information from unstructured text documents with precise source grounding and interactive visualization, adaptable to various domains and LLM providers.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Extracting structured information from unstructured text documents with precise source grounding and interactive visualization, adaptable to various domains and LLM providers.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Precise Source Grounding: Maps every extraction to its exact location in the source text.
✅ Reliable Structured Outputs: Enforces a consistent output schema using few-shot examples and controlled generation.
✅ Optimized for Long Documents: Handles large documents through text chunking, parallel processing, and multiple passes.
✅ Interactive Visualization: Generates self-contained HTML files for reviewing extracted entities in context.
✅ Flexible LLM Support: Compatible with cloud LLMs (e.g., Gemini) and local models via Ollama.
✅ Adaptable to Any Domain: Define extraction tasks with few-shot examples without model fine-tuning.


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 35.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.4K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 77 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LangExtract is a Python library designed to extract structured information from unstructured text using Large Language Models (LLMs). It ensures precise source grounding for extracted data and offers interactive visualization of results, supporting various LLM providers including cloud-based and local models.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧
